---
title: "Francis Turner Palgrave"
---

## Francis Turner Palgrave

**Dates:** (1824-1897)

### Description

anthologist and historian,  son of Sir Francis Palgrave, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1878-91)

### Letters

- Letter from December 10, 1896.
- Letter from May 12 1880
- Letter from Sept 8th 1874
- Letter from May 13th [1867]
- Letter from Jan 14th 1867
- Letter from [About 1865]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
